notes.nextGameDay: Replaced at runtime by JS. 'tomorrow' if next game is the next calendar day, otherwise 'on [day of week, e.g. Monday]'.
notes.nextHomeGame: Replaced at runtime by JS with the date of the next scheduled home game. Format: 'Saturday, April 19th' (full day name, full month name, day with ordinal suffix).
notes.loss_ot_so: Triggered when game ends in OT or SO as a loss. Detected via NHL API lossType field.
